message:
fix(wizer): Use global mutable arrays for WAMR native symbols

WAMR's wasm_runtime_register_natives() modifies the NativeSymbol array
in-place and retains references to it. Using const local arrays caused
crashes on Linux x86_64 because the memory was in a read-only section.

Solution: Move symbol arrays to global scope and declare as var (mutable).
This matches the pattern used in edgebox_wamr.zig where host functions
are registered correctly.
